allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe", "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe", "$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } else { Write-Output "missing: $p" } })

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb shell am force-stop com.example.smart_aac_speech_learning; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; & $adb shell monkey -p com.example.smart_aac_speech_learning -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1)
